/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/bridge_stress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/mctp_random_messages_embedded.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_BcastMessenger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_MctpFramer_decode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_MctpNetlink_builder_only.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_MctpNetlink_smoke.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_linuxserial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_runner.cpp.o -o test_runner  -Wl,-rpath,/home/doug/git/mctp-serial-linux/build/linux-mctp/libsermctp/src ../libsermctp.so.1.0.0 -lnl-genl-3 -lnl-route-3 -lnl-3
